tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
Community Board 18, Brooklyn
B82 Southern Brooklyn Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: B82 Southern Brooklyn Select Bus Service. The Southern Brooklyn B82 corridor was identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service in the 2009 Bus Rapid Transit Phase II Study.

payload.project_name: B82 Southern Brooklyn Select Bus Service
payload.description: Proposed B82 Select Bus Service conversion along the Southern Brooklyn B82 corridor from Kings Hwy to Pennsylvania Ave, including bus lanes, safety treatments, off-board fare collection, SBS stop amenities, and route re-alignments via Ave K and Glenwood Rd

tool_args.label: B82 Corridor - Kings Hwy to Pennsylvania Ave
tool_args.raw_text: The Southern Brooklyn B82 corridor was identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service in the 2009 Bus Rapid Transit Phase II Study. Serves 32,000 daily riders on B82 Limited and Local.

payload.street: Kings Highway, Flatlands Avenue, Pennsylvania Avenue
payload.description: East-west transit corridor across Southern Brooklyn from Kings Hwy to Pennsylvania Ave, serving 32,000 daily riders on B82 Limited and Local

tool_args.label: Widen/reconfigure travel lanes
tool_args.raw_text: Widen/reconfigure travel lanes: Represented by an orange line, located on Flatlands Ave.

payload.description: Proposed widening/reconfiguring of travel lanes on Flatlands Ave

tool_args.label: Major safety treatment
tool_args.raw_text: Major safety treatment: Indicated by a circular icon with radiating lines, located at several intersections including Cropsey Ave/Bay 37 St, Kings Hwy/Nostrand Ave, Kings Hwy/Ave K, Flatlands/Ralph intersection, and Glenwood re-route to Canarsie L train station.

payload.description: Proposed major safety treatment at intersections including Cropsey Ave/Bay 37 St, Kings Hwy/Nostrand Ave, Kings Hwy/Ave K, Flatlands/Ralph intersection, and Glenwood re-route to Canarsie L train station

tool_args.label: Kings Hwy from Nostrand Ave to Ave K treatments
tool_args.raw_text: Kings Hwy from Nostrand Ave to Ave K. Larger, lighted bus shelters. Real-time passenger information screens and off-board fare payment. Reconstructed, level landing platforms. Wider medians with ample space for passengers. Added seating. ADA accessible bus stops with subway-style edge strips.

payload.description: Proposed street treatments on Kings Hwy from Nostrand Ave to Ave K including larger lighted bus shelters, real-time passenger information screens, off-board fare payment, reconstructed level landing platforms, wider medians, added seating, ADA accessible bus stops with subway-style edge strips
payload.location_text: Kings Hwy from Nostrand Ave to Ave K, Brooklyn

normalized_location.raw_text: Kings Hwy from Nostrand Ave to Ave K, Brooklyn

tool_args.label: Flatlands/Ralph intersection redesign
tool_args.raw_text: Flatlands/Ralph intersection redesign. Convert this block from two-way to one-way, Close slip, Pedestrian island, Bus lane, Eastbound left turn banned, Two right turn only lanes, Northbound left turn banned, signal timing changes for improved safety, traffic flow, better synchronization of traffic lights along Flatlands.

payload.description: Flatlands/Ralph intersection redesign including converting Paerdegat Ave block from two-way to one-way, closing slip lane, pedestrian island, bus lane, eastbound left turn banned, two right turn only lanes, northbound left turn banned, signal timing changes for safety and traffic flow, better synchronization of traffic lights along Flatlands
payload.location_text: Flatlands Ave at Ralph Ave, Brooklyn

normalized_location.raw_text: Flatlands Ave at Ralph Ave, Brooklyn

tool_args.label: Flatlands Ave E 80 St to Rockaway Pkwy widening
tool_args.raw_text: Flatlands Ave from E 80 St to Rockaway Pkwy. Widen travel lanes, bus stops, parking lanes to reduce lane conflicts. Remove small, narrow, lightly used left turn bays along Flatlands Ave. Keep turn bays at major intersections (E 80 St, Remsen, Rockaway Pkwy).

payload.description: Proposed widening of travel lanes, bus stops, and parking lanes to reduce lane conflicts; remove small narrow lightly used left turn bays along Flatlands Ave; keep turn bays at major intersections (E 80 St, Remsen, Rockaway Pkwy)
payload.location_text: Flatlands Ave from E 80 St to Rockaway Pkwy, Brooklyn

tool_args.label: Glenwood Rd bus lane
tool_args.raw_text: Glenwood Rd from Rockaway Pkwy to E 103 St. Bus lane replaces parking lane along north curb (E 98 St to E 103 St). Direct bus connection to Canarsie-Rockaway Pkwy station. Eastbound open to all traffic. Westbound buses only.

payload.description: Proposed Glenwood Rd bus lane replaces parking lane along north curb (E 98 St to E 103 St). Direct bus connection to Canarsie-Rockaway Pkwy station. Eastbound open to all traffic. Westbound buses only.

tool_args.label: Flatlands Ave at Ave I intersection treatment
tool_args.raw_text: Simplify intersection by converting Ave I to one-way westbound for this block. Add angled parking. Shorten crosswalks by expanding corner. Add eastbound bus lane from E 57 St to Ralph Ave to help with bus & traffic congestion here.

tool_args.label: B82 re-route via Glenwood Rd
tool_args.raw_text: Propose re-routing westbound buses via Glenwood Rd. Streamlines routing, removes unnecessary distance & turns. More customer-friendly routing by matching both directions. Reduces bus traffic on local streets and at major intersections.

payload.description: Proposed re-routing westbound buses via Glenwood Rd to streamline routing, remove unnecessary distance and turns, create more customer-friendly routing by matching both directions, reduce bus traffic on local streets and at major intersections
payload.location_text: Glenwood Rd from Rockaway Pkwy to E 103 St, Brooklyn

normalized_location.raw_text: Glenwood Rd from Rockaway Pkwy to E 103 St, Brooklyn

tool_args.label: B82 re-route via Ave K
tool_args.raw_text: Proposed routing (dark blue) connects Kings Hwy to Flatlands Ave via Ave K. Benefits: Easier bus turns across lighter traffic. Removes bus from difficult intersections. Less traffic conflict on wider Ave K (4 lanes, 65' wide). Reduces bus travel time. Reduces Flatbush congestion.

payload.description: Proposed re-routing via Ave K to connect Kings Hwy to Flatlands Ave. Benefits include easier bus turns across lighter traffic, removes bus from difficult intersections, less traffic conflict on wider Ave K (4 lanes, 65' wide), reduces bus travel time, reduces Flatbush congestion.
payload.location_text: Ave K from Kings Hwy to Flatlands Ave, Brooklyn

tool_args.label: Existing routing issues - via Flatbush Ave

tool_args.label: B82 transit issues - long lines and ADA gaps
tool_args.raw_text: Over 50% of trip spent at red lights, crawling, or at bus stops. Customers wait in long lines to pay on board the bus. Bus stops lack amenities, not ADA accessible.
